seoTitle: Melton vs Melton South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Melton and Melton South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Melton vs Melton South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Melton and Melton South.
heading: Melton vs Melton South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Melton, Victoria and Melton South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Melton South has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Melton (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Melton or Melton South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Melton has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Melton South scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Melton scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Melton South scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Melton or Melton South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Melton South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
